question: Using account snapshots, identify accounts that crossed from positive available balance into overdraft and report their longest overdraft run.
first_generated_sql:
WITH snapshots AS (
    SELECT 
        ba.banking_account_sk,
        ba.banking_account_id,
        ba.available_balance_effective,
        ba.snapshot_date_sk,
        d.full_date,
        LAG(ba.available_balance_effective) OVER (
            PARTITION BY ba.banking_account_sk 
            ORDER BY ba.snapshot_date_sk
        ) AS prev_balance
    FROM fact_banking_accounts ba
    JOIN dim_date d ON ba.snapshot_date_sk = d.date_sk
),
negative_streaks AS (
    SELECT 
        banking_account_sk,
        banking_account_id,
        snapshot_date_sk,
        full_date,
        available_balance_effective,
        prev_balance,
        CASE 
            WHEN available_balance_effective < 0 AND prev_balance >= 0 THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END AS is_new_streak
    FROM snapshots
    WHERE available_balance_effective < 0
),
streak_grouped AS (
    SELECT 
        banking_account_sk,
        banking_account_id,
        snapshot_date_sk,
        full_date,
        SUM(is_new_streak) OVER (
            PARTITION BY banking_account_sk 
            ORDER BY snapshot_date_sk
        ) AS streak_id
    FROM negative_streaks
),
streak_lengths AS (
    SELECT 
        banking_account_sk,
        banking_account_id,
        streak_id,
        MIN(snapshot_date_sk) AS streak_start_sk,
        MAX(snapshot_date_sk) AS streak_end_sk,
        MAX(snapshot_date_sk) - MIN(snapshot_date_sk) + 1 AS run_length_days
    FROM streak_grouped
    GROUP BY banking_account_sk, banking_account_id, streak_id
),
account_longest AS (
    SELECT 
        banking_account_sk,
        banking_account_id,
        MAX(run_length_days) AS longest_overdraft_run_days
    FROM streak_lengths
    GROUP BY banking_account_sk, banking_account_id
)
SELECT 
    banking_account_id AS account_id,
    longest_overdraft_run_days
FROM account_longest
ORDER BY longest_overdraft_run_days DESC;

question: Using account snapshots, identify accounts that crossed from positive available balance into overdraft and report their longest overdraft run.
first_generated_sql:
WITH ordered_snapshots AS (
    SELECT 
        ba.banking_account_id,
        ba.available_balance_effective,
        d.full_date,
        LAG(ba.available_balance_effective) OVER (
            PARTITION BY ba.banking_account_id 
            ORDER BY d.full_date
        ) AS prev_avail
    FROM fact_banking_accounts ba
    JOIN dim_date d ON ba.snapshot_date_sk = d.date_sk
),
with_flags AS (
    SELECT 
        *,
        (available_balance_effective < 0) AS is_overdraft,
        (prev_avail > 0 AND available_balance_effective < 0) AS crossed_into_overdraft
    FROM ordered_snapshots
),
with_run_grp AS (
    SELECT *,
        SUM(CASE WHEN is_overdraft THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) OVER (
            PARTITION BY banking_account_id 
            ORDER BY full_date
        ) AS run_grp
    FROM with_flags
),
overdraft_runs AS (
    SELECT 
        banking_account_id,
        run_grp,
        COUNT(*) AS run_length
    FROM with_run_grp
    WHERE is_overdraft = true
    GROUP BY banking_account_id, run_grp
),
eligible_accounts AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT banking_account_id
    FROM with_flags
    WHERE crossed_into_overdraft = true
)
SELECT 
    ea.banking_account_id AS account_id,
    MAX(or2.run_length) AS max_consecutive_overdraft_days
FROM eligible_accounts ea
JOIN overdraft_runs or2 ON ea.banking_account_id = or2.banking_account_id
GROUP BY ea.banking_account_id
ORDER BY account_id

    SELECT *,

           s.rn
    FROM snapshots s
    JOIN eligible_accounts e ON s.banking_account_id = e.banking_account_id
),
negative_islands AS (
    SELECT *,
        rn - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY banking_account_id ORDER BY snapshot_date_sk) AS grp
    FROM eligible_snapshots
    WHERE available_balance_effective < 0
),
island_lengths AS (
    SELECT banking_account_id,
           grp,
           COUNT(*) AS run_length
    FROM negative_islands
    GROUP BY banking_account_id, grp
),
longest_run AS (
    SELECT banking_account_id,
           MAX(run_length) AS longest_overdraft_run
    FROM island_lengths
    GROUP BY banking_account_id
)

       longest_overdraft_run
FROM longest_run
ORDER BY account_id

question: List lease installments due in 2024 that were paid more than 15 days late, with the total collected gross late-fee cash per installment.
first_generated_sql:
WITH date_map AS (
    SELECT date_sk, full_date, calendar_year
    FROM dim_date
),
installments AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.contract_cashflow_sk,
        cc.contract_cashflow_id,
        cc.installment_number,
        cc.amount_gross AS installment_amount_gross,
        dd.full_date AS due_date,
        cc.related_leasing_contract_sk
    FROM fact_contract_cashflows cc
    JOIN date_map dd ON dd.date_sk = cc.due_date_sk AND dd.calendar_year = 2024
    WHERE cc.related_leasing_contract_sk IS NOT NULL
),
payments AS (
    SELECT 
        pt.related_contract_cashflow_sk,
        pt.fee_amount_net,
        dd2.full_date AS payment_date,
        DATEDIFF(day, i.due_date, dd2.full_date) AS days_late
    FROM fact_payment_transactions pt
    JOIN date_map dd2 ON dd2.date_sk = pt.transaction_date_sk
    JOIN installments i ON i.contract_cashflow_sk = pt.related_contract_cashflow_sk
    WHERE (pt.is_reversal_flag IS NULL OR pt.is_reversal_flag = FALSE)
      AND i.due_date < dd2.full_date
)
SELECT 
    i.contract_cashflow_id,
    i.due_date,
    i.installment_number,
    i.installment_amount_gross,
    MAX(p.payment_date) AS last_payment_date,
    MAX(p.days_late) AS max_days_late,
    COALESCE(SUM(p.fee_amount_net), 0) AS total_late_fee_collected
FROM installments i
JOIN payments p ON i.contract_cashflow_sk = p.related_contract_cashflow_sk
WHERE p.days_late > 15
GROUP BY i.contract_cashflow_id, i.due_date, i.installment_number, i.installment_amount_gross
ORDER BY i.due_date;

question: List lease installments due in 2024 that were paid more than 15 days late, with the total collected gross late-fee cash per installment.
first_generated_sql:
WITH
  -- Lease installment cashflows due in 2024
  due_installments AS (
    SELECT
      cf.contract_cashflow_sk,
      cf.contract_cashflow_id,
      due_date.full_date AS due_date
    FROM fact_contract_cashflows cf
    JOIN dim_date due_date
      ON cf.due_date_sk = due_date.date_sk
    WHERE cf.related_leasing_contract_sk IS NOT NULL
      AND cf.installment_number IS NOT NULL
      AND due_date.calendar_year = 2024
  ),
  -- Keep only installments that have a non‑reversed PAYMENT >15 days late
  late_installments AS (
    SELECT d.*
    FROM due_installments d
    WHERE EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM fact_payment_transactions p
      JOIN dim_date vd ON p.value_date_sk = vd.date_sk
      WHERE p.related_contract_cashflow_sk = d.contract_cashflow_sk
        AND p.is_reversal_flag = false
        AND p.transaction_type_code = 'PAYMENT'
        AND (vd.full_date - d.due_date) > 15
    )
  )
-- Sum gross late-fee collections per qualifying installment
SELECT
  li.contract_cashflow_id AS installment_id,
  COALESCE(SUM(lf.amount_gross), 0) AS total_late_fee_cash
FROM late_installments li
LEFT JOIN fact_payment_transactions lf
  ON lf.related_contract_cashflow_sk = li.contract_cashflow_sk
  AND lf.is_reversal_flag = false
  AND lf.transaction_type_code = 'LATE_FEE_COLLECTION'
GROUP BY li.contract_cashflow_sk, li.contract_cashflow_id
ORDER BY installment_id

question: List lease installments due in 2024 that were paid more than 15 days late, with the total collected gross late-fee cash per installment.
first_generated_sql:
WITH installment_payments AS (
    -- Identify lease installments due in 2024 and their actual payment dates
    SELECT
        cf.contract_cashflow_sk,
        cf.contract_cashflow_id AS installment_id,
        cf.related_leasing_contract_sk,
        d1.full_date AS due_date,
        d2.full_date AS payment_date,
        DATEDIFF('day', d1.full_date, d2.full_date) AS days_late
    FROM fact_contract_cashflows cf
    JOIN dim_date d1
        ON cf.due_date_sk = d1.date_sk
    JOIN fact_payment_transactions pt
        ON cf.contract_cashflow_sk = pt.related_contract_cashflow_sk
        AND pt.is_reversal_flag = false
        AND pt.transaction_type_code = 'PAYMENT'  -- actual installment payment
    JOIN dim_date d2
        ON pt.value_date_sk = d2.date_sk
    WHERE cf.related_leasing_contract_sk IS NOT NULL   -- only lease installments
        AND d1.calendar_year = 2024                    -- due in 2024
        AND DATEDIFF('day', d1.full_date, d2.full_date) > 15  -- paid more than 15 days late
),
late_fees AS (
    -- Collect gross late-fee transactions linked to the same installments
    SELECT
        cf.contract_cashflow_sk,
        pt.amount_gross AS late_fee_gross
    FROM fact_contract_cashflows cf
    JOIN fact_payment_transactions pt
        ON cf.contract_cashflow_sk = pt.related_contract_cashflow_sk
        AND pt.is_reversal_flag = false
        AND pt.transaction_type_code = 'LATE_FEE_COLLECTION'
)
SELECT
    ip.installment_id,
    lc.leasing_contract_id AS lease_id,
    COALESCE(SUM(lf.late_fee_gross), 0) AS total_collected_gross_late_fee_cash
FROM installment_payments ip
LEFT JOIN late_fees lf
    ON ip.contract_cashflow_sk = lf.contract_cashflow_sk
JOIN fact_leasing_contracts lc
    ON ip.related_leasing_contract_sk = lc.leasing_contract_sk
GROUP BY ip.installment_id, lc.leasing_contract_id
ORDER BY lc.leasing_contract_id, ip.installment_id

        flc.leasing_contract_id AS lease_id,
        DATE_DIFF('day', dd_due.full_date, dd_val.full_date) AS days_late
    FROM fact_contract_cashflows fcc
    INNER JOIN fact_leasing_contracts flc
        ON fcc.related_leasing_contract_sk = flc.leasing_contract_sk
    INNER JOIN dim_date dd_due
        ON fcc.due_date_sk = dd_due.date_sk
    INNER JOIN fact_payment_transactions fpt
        ON fcc.contract_cashflow_sk = fpt.related_contract_cashflow_sk
        AND fpt.transaction_type_code = 'PAYMENT'
        AND fpt.is_reversal_flag = false
    INNER JOIN dim_date dd_val
        ON fpt.value_date_sk = dd_val.date_sk
    WHERE fcc.related_leasing_contract_sk IS NOT NULL
      AND fcc.installment_number IS NOT NULL
      AND dd_due.calendar_year = 2024
),
late_fee_aggregates AS (
    SELECT
        fpt.related_contract_cashflow_sk,
        SUM(fpt.amount_gross) AS total_late_fee_gross
    FROM fact_payment_transactions fpt
    WHERE fpt.transaction_type_code = 'LATE_FEE_COLLECTION'
      AND fpt.is_reversal_flag = false
    GROUP BY fpt.related_contract_cashflow_sk
)
SELECT
    ip.installment_id,
    ip.lease_id,
    COALESCE(lfa.total_late_fee_gross, 0) AS total_late_fee_gross
FROM installment_payments ip
LEFT JOIN late_fee_aggregates lfa
    ON ip.contract_cashflow_sk = lfa.related_contract_cashflow_sk
WHERE ip.days_late > 15
ORDER BY ip.lease_id, ip.installment_id

question: Find customers who missed planned loan installments for three consecutive calendar months.
first_generated_sql:
WITH planned_loan_cashflows AS (
  SELECT ccf.contract_cashflow_sk,
         ccf.customer_sk,
         d.calendar_year,
         d.calendar_month,
         d.calendar_year * 12 + d.calendar_month AS month_num
  FROM fact_contract_cashflows ccf
  JOIN dim_cashflow_type cft ON ccf.cashflow_type_sk = cft.cashflow_type_sk
  JOIN dim_date d ON ccf.due_date_sk = d.date_sk
  WHERE cft.is_planned_flag = TRUE
    AND ccf.related_loan_contract_sk IS NOT NULL
    AND ccf.due_date_sk <= (SELECT MAX(date_sk) FROM dim_date)
),
payments AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT related_contract_cashflow_sk
  FROM fact_payment_transactions
  WHERE (is_reversal_flag IS NULL OR is_reversal_flag = FALSE)
    AND related_contract_cashflow_sk IS NOT NULL
),
missed_by_month AS (
  SELECT pc.customer_sk,
         pc.calendar_year,
         pc.calendar_month,
         pc.month_num,
         COUNT(DISTINCT pc.contract_cashflow_sk) AS total_planned,
         COUNT(DISTINCT pmt.related_contract_cashflow_sk) AS paid_count
  FROM planned_loan_cashflows pc
  LEFT JOIN payments pmt ON pc.contract_cashflow_sk = pmt.related_contract_cashflow_sk
  GROUP BY pc.customer_sk, pc.calendar_year, pc.calendar_month, pc.month_num
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT pc.contract_cashflow_sk) > 0
     AND COUNT(DISTINCT pmt.related_contract_cashflow_sk) < COUNT(DISTINCT pc.contract_cashflow_sk)
),
consecutive_groups AS (
  SELECT customer_sk,
         month_num,
         LAG(month_num, 2) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_sk ORDER BY month_num) AS prev2
  FROM missed_by_month
)
SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_sk,
                c.customer_id,
                c.first_name,
                c.last_name
FROM consecutive_groups cg
JOIN dim_customer c ON cg.customer_sk = c.customer_sk
WHERE cg.prev2 IS NOT NULL
  AND cg.month_num - cg.prev2 = 2;

question: Find customers who missed planned loan installments for three consecutive calendar months.
first_generated_sql:
WITH
  -- Current date from the date dimension
  current_date AS (
    SELECT MAX(full_date) AS dt FROM dim_date
  ),
  -- Define loan installment cashflow type
  loan_installment_types AS (
    SELECT cashflow_type_sk
    FROM dim_cashflow_type
    WHERE cashflow_type_code = 'LOAN_INSTALLMENT'
      AND is_recurring_flag = TRUE
  ),
  -- Planned loan installment cashflows with due date month and current check
  planned_installments AS (
    SELECT
      cf.contract_cashflow_sk,
      cf.customer_sk,
      cf.due_date_sk,
      d.calendar_year,
      d.calendar_month,
      d.full_date AS due_full_date
    FROM fact_contract_cashflows cf
    JOIN loan_installment_types lt ON cf.cashflow_type_sk = lt.cashflow_type_sk
    JOIN dim_date d ON cf.due_date_sk = d.date_sk
    CROSS JOIN current_date cd
    WHERE d.full_date <= cd.dt
  ),
  -- Non-reversed payments linked to cashflows
  paid_cashflows AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT related_contract_cashflow_sk
    FROM fact_payment_transactions
    WHERE is_reversal_flag = FALSE
      AND related_contract_cashflow_sk IS NOT NULL
  ),
  -- Mark each installment as missed if no matching payment
  missed_installments AS (
    SELECT
      pi.customer_sk,
      pi.calendar_year,
      pi.calendar_month,
      pi.contract_cashflow_sk
    FROM planned_installments pi
    LEFT JOIN paid_cashflows pc ON pi.contract_cashflow_sk = pc.related_contract_cashflow_sk
    WHERE pc.related_contract_cashflow_sk IS NULL
  ),
  -- Per customer-month: was there at least one missed installment?
  customer_month_missed AS (
    SELECT
      customer_sk,
      calendar_year,
      calendar_month,
      1 AS missed_flag
    FROM missed_installments
    GROUP BY customer_sk, calendar_year, calendar_month
  ),
  -- Per customer: months that had any planned installment (for continuity)
  customer_month_all AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
      customer_sk,
      calendar_year,
      calendar_month
    FROM planned_installments
  ),
  -- Combine: for each customer-month that has a planned installment, mark missed flag (0 if none missed)
  customer_month_status AS (
    SELECT
      cma.customer_sk,
      cma.calendar_year,
      cma.calendar_month,
      COALESCE(cmm.missed_flag, 0) AS missed_flag,
      (cma.calendar_year * 100 + cma.calendar_month) AS ym_num
    FROM customer_month_all cma
    LEFT JOIN customer_month_missed cmm
      ON cma.customer_sk = cmm.customer_sk
      AND cma.calendar_year = cmm.calendar_year
      AND cma.calendar_month = cmm.calendar_month
  ),
  -- Detect consecutive missed month groups per customer
  consecutive_groups AS (
    SELECT
      customer_sk,
      ym_num,
      missed_flag,
      ym_num - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_sk ORDER BY ym_num) AS grp
    FROM customer_month_status
    WHERE missed_flag = 1
  ),
  -- Count consecutive missed months per group
  missed_streaks AS (
    SELECT
      customer_sk,
      COUNT(*) AS streak_length,
      MIN(ym_num) AS start_ym,
      MAX(ym_num) AS end_ym
    FROM consecutive_groups
    GROUP BY customer_sk, grp
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
  ),
  -- Customers with at least one streak of 3+ consecutive missed months
  qualifying_customers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT customer_sk FROM missed_streaks
  )
-- Final output: customer ID and full name
SELECT DISTINCT
  c.customer_id,
  CONCAT(c.first_name, ' ', c.last_name) AS customer_name
FROM qualifying_customers qc
JOIN dim_customer c ON qc.customer_sk = c.customer_sk
WHERE c.is_current_record = TRUE
ORDER BY customer_id; -- deterministic order

question: For active leases, calculate the portfolio-weighted effective customer rate by the customer's employment status at booking time.
first_generated_sql:
WITH active_leases AS (
    SELECT l.leasing_contract_sk, l.interest_rate_effective, l.financed_amount_net, l.customer_sk, l.booking_date_sk
    FROM fact_leasing_contracts l
    JOIN dim_contract_status cs ON l.contract_status_sk = cs.contract_status_sk
    WHERE cs.is_active_flag = TRUE
),
customer_at_booking AS (
    SELECT al.interest_rate_effective, al.financed_amount_net, c.employment_status_code
    FROM active_leases al
    JOIN dim_date d ON al.booking_date_sk = d.date_sk
    JOIN dim_customer c ON al.customer_sk = c.customer_sk
        AND c.valid_from_date <= d.full_date
        AND (c.valid_to_date IS NULL OR c.valid_to_date >= d.full_date)
    WHERE al.interest_rate_effective IS NOT NULL
      AND al.financed_amount_net IS NOT NULL
      AND al.financed_amount_net > 0
)
SELECT 
    COALESCE(employment_status_code, 'Unknown') AS employment_status_code,
    SUM(interest_rate_effective * financed_amount_net) / NULLIF(SUM(financed_amount_net), 0) AS portfolio_weighted_effective_rate
FROM customer_at_booking
GROUP BY employment_status_code
ORDER BY employment_status_code;

question: For cross-currency settlements, calculate total absolute FX variance between planned net amount converted at the effective rate and actual settlement amount.
first_generated_sql:
WITH cross_currency_settlements AS (
    SELECT
        p.payment_transaction_sk,
        p.settlement_amount_effective,
        p.exchange_rate_effective,
        c.amount_net AS planned_net_amount,
        c.currency_code AS plan_currency,
        p.currency_code AS settle_currency,
        ABS(c.amount_net * COALESCE(p.exchange_rate_effective, 1) - p.settlement_amount_effective) AS fx_variance
    FROM fact_payment_transactions p
    INNER JOIN fact_contract_cashflows c

    WHERE p.is_reversal_flag = false

      AND p.currency_code IS NOT NULL

)

    d.full_date AS settlement_date,

FROM cross_currency_settlements ccs
INNER JOIN dim_date d

    COUNT(DISTINCT oi.payment_transaction_sk) AS original_inflow_count,

        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT oi.payment_transaction_sk) > 0

        ELSE NULL

question: For contracts maturing in Q4 2023, report cash realization by product family after accounting for signed reversal rows.
first_generated_sql: UNANSWERABLE
final_generated_sql:
WITH
  -- Contracts maturing in Q4 2023
  maturing_contracts AS (
    SELECT
      lc.leasing_contract_sk AS contract_sk,
      lc.product_sk,
      'LEASING' AS contract_type
    FROM fact_leasing_contracts lc
    INNER JOIN dim_date d ON lc.maturity_date_sk = d.date_sk
    WHERE d.full_date >= '2023-10-01' AND d.full_date <= '2023-12-31'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      lc.loan_contract_sk,
      lc.product_sk,
      'LOAN'
    FROM fact_loan_contracts lc
    INNER JOIN dim_date d ON lc.maturity_date_sk = d.date_sk
    WHERE d.full_date >= '2023-10-01' AND d.full_date <= '2023-12-31'
  ),
  -- Non-reversal payments (successful original inflows)
  original_payments AS (
    SELECT
      p.payment_transaction_sk,
      p.amount_gross,
      p.related_leasing_contract_sk,
      p.related_loan_contract_sk
    FROM fact_payment_transactions p
    WHERE p.is_reversal_flag = FALSE
  ),
  -- Reversal rows only
  reversal_rows AS (
    SELECT
      r.reverses_payment_transaction_sk,
      r.amount_gross
    FROM fact_payment_transactions r
    WHERE r.is_reversal_flag = TRUE
  ),
  -- Link reversal rows to their original payment to get contract reference
  linked_reversals AS (
    SELECT
      r.amount_gross,
      o.related_leasing_contract_sk,
      o.related_loan_contract_sk
    FROM reversal_rows r
    INNER JOIN original_payments o ON r.reverses_payment_transaction_sk = o.payment_transaction_sk
  ),
  -- All payments (original + reversal) with contract foreign keys
  all_payments AS (
    SELECT amount_gross, related_leasing_contract_sk, related_loan_contract_sk
    FROM original_payments
    UNION ALL
    SELECT amount_gross, related_leasing_contract_sk, related_loan_contract_sk
    FROM linked_reversals
  )
-- Final aggregation by product family
SELECT
  dp.product_family_code AS product_family,
  SUM(ap.amount_gross) AS cash_realization_amount
FROM all_payments ap
INNER JOIN maturing_contracts mc
  ON (ap.related_leasing_contract_sk = mc.contract_sk AND mc.contract_type = 'LEASING')
  OR (ap.related_loan_contract_sk = mc.contract_sk AND mc.contract_type = 'LOAN')
INNER JOIN dim_product dp ON mc.product_sk = dp.product_sk
GROUP BY dp.product_family_code
ORDER BY dp.product_family_code

SELECT SUM(fc.tax_amount_gross) AS planned_gross_tax
FROM fact_loan_contracts flc
JOIN dim_contract_status dcs
    ON flc.contract_status_sk = dcs.contract_status_sk
    AND dcs.status_code = 'ACTIVE'
JOIN fact_contract_cashflows fc
    ON fc.related_loan_contract_sk = flc.loan_contract_sk
JOIN dim_date dd
    ON fc.due_date_sk = dd.date_sk
    AND dd.calendar_year = 2024
    AND dd.calendar_month = 3
final_answer: Der geplante Bruttosteuerbetrag für aktive Darlehensverträge im März 2024 beträgt 30.768,45.
